args.sql: SELECT teigid FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.teig AS t WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM stormflohavniva.stormflohavniva_fa23a1affeea4d26adf1af29afd20ef9.stormflo200ar_klimaarna AS sf WHERE ST_Intersects(t.geom, sf.omrade)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM flomsoner.flomsoner_92001766ec964ab8b545fef0a00e6d23.flomareal AS f WHERE ST_Intersects(t.geom, f.omrade) AND f.gjentaksintervall = 200) AND t.kommunenummer = '4206' ORDER BY teigid ASC LIMIT 10
